infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Cravix Rider needs camera access to capture KYC documents and delivery proof photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Cravix Rider needs photo-library access so you can upload KYC documents.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Cravix Rider needs your location while you are on duty to assign nearby orders and provide turn-by-turn navigation.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Cravix Rider continues to track your location during an active shift to keep deliveries on schedule.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Cravix Rider may use the microphone for in-app voice support calls.
